Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Sōya | title = [[:en:Sōya Subprefecture|Sōya Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[:en:List of cities in Hokkaido|City]] | list1 = *[[:en:Wakkanai|Wakkanai]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = *[[:en:Esashi District, Hokkaido|Esashi District]] **[[:en:Esashi, Hokkaido (Sōya)|Esashi]] **[[:en:Hamatonbetsu, Hokkaido|Hamatonbetsu]] **[[:en:Nakatonbetsu, Hokkaido|Nakatonbetsu]] *[[:en:Rebun District, Hokkaido|Rebun District]] **[[:en:Rebun, Hokkaido|Rebun]] *[[:en:Rishiri District, Hokkaido|Rishiri District]] **[[:en:Rishiri, Hokkaido|Rishiri]] **[[:en:Rishirifuji, Hokkaido|Rishirifuji]] *[[:en:Sōya District, Hokkaido|Sōya District]] **[[:en:Sarufutsu, Hokkaido|Sarufutsu]] *[[:en:Teshio District, Hokkaido|Teshio District]] **[[:en:Toyotomi, Hokkaido|Toyotomi]] **[[:en:Horonobe, Hokkaido|Horonobe]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
